mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1) AS totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE status = 1) AS totalDepts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wf_process_instance WHERE status = 'PENDING') AS pendingApprovals, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wf_process_instance WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayInstances

SELECT u.real_name AS name, ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, r.create_time, r.approve_time)), 1) AS value FROM wf_approval_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = r.approver_id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(r.create_time, '%Y-%m') = #{month} AND r.action = 'APPROVE' AND r.approve_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.approver_id ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT d.dept_name AS name, COUNT(c.id) AS value FROM sys_dept d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN att_clock_record c ON c.user_id = u.id AND YEAR(c.clock_time) = #{year} AND MONTH(c.clock_time) = #{month} WHERE d.status = 1 GROUP BY d.id

SELECT l.leave_type AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM att_leave_request l WHERE YEAR(l.create_time) = #{year} AND MONTH(l.create_time) = #{month} AND l.status IN ('PASSED','APPROVING','PENDING') GROUP BY l.leave_type
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM wf_process_instance WHERE YEAR(create_time) = #{year} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY name
SELECT d.dept_name AS name, COUNT(u.id) AS value FROM sys_dept d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.dept_id = d.id AND u.status = 1 WHERE d.status = 1 GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY value DESC
